dumps.notes: Program PROM hypothesis; M25A10PA plausibly corresponds to 256 kbit / 32 KB. Disassemble with ../mame/unidasm -arch upd7810 -basepc 0x0000.

dumps.expected_size: current captured evidence should decide; 64 KB is plausible from a 27C512 read, while 1 Mbit / 128 KiB remains unproven until pin 1 / higher address selection or a 27C011-style read is checked
dumps.notes: Board photos suggest 4C is a socketed ROM-like DIP28 device. Lead with the actual captured size. minipro reports AT27C011@DIP28/D27C011@DIP28/D27011@DIP28 as 131072-byte devices but T56-only. With T48, 27C512@DIP28 can test a 64 KB read; do not describe 4C as 128 KiB unless pin tracing or a suitable read proves it.

dumps.expected_size: confirm from chip markings; 4M label likely means 4 Mbit if populated
dumps.notes: Character generator select; banked into 8000h-A000h. Board photos suggest this footprint may be unpopulated and labeled 4M/2M/1M/256kbit MASK IMPROM; do not assume stock population or size without chip markings.
Use for optional font module or any extra CG ROM present.
